recommendations.title: Curse of the Blair Witch
recommendations.overview: A mockumentary exploring the life of the Blair Witch and the three missing student filmmakers.

recommendations.title: Exists
recommendations.overview: A group of friends venture into the remote Texas woods for a party weekend and find themselves stalked by Bigfoot.

recommendations.title: Solstice
recommendations.overview: While on a summer trip with her friends, Megan begins to feel the presence of Sophie, her twin sister who recently committed suicide.

recommendations.title: Lovely Molly
recommendations.overview: A supernatural presence menaces a newlywed couple after they move into the wife's long-abandoned childhood home.

recommendations.title: Altered
recommendations.overview: Fifteen years ago, five men were abducted by aliens. Only four returned. Now, these same four men have managed to capture one of the creatures who killed their friend and ruined their lives.

recommendations.title: The Objective

recommendations.title: The Imposter
recommendations.overview: In 1994, a 13-year-old boy disappeared without a trace from his home in San Antonio, Texas. Three-and-a-half years later, he is found alive in a village in southern Spain with a horrifying story of kidnap and torture. His family is overjoyed to bring

recommendations.title: American Murder: The Family Next Door
recommendations.overview: Using raw, firsthand footage, this documentary examines the disappearance of Shanann Watts and her children, and the terrible events that followed.

recommendations.title: V/H/S/2

recommendations.director: Gareth Evans, Eduardo Sánchez, Timo Tjahjanto, Jason Eisener, Adam Wingard, Gregg Hale, Simon Barrett

recommendations.title: I See You
recommendations.overview: When a 12-year-old boy goes missing at a local park, a detective investigates the case to help the boy's family find answers.
